rows.label: xs99110120_MSG0001
rows.name: Lin-san! Lin-san! What are you making, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110120_MSG0002
rows.name: Today I'm making pie, an Earth snack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110120_MSG0003
rows.name:
If it's pie, Tatsu doesn't need to
worry about becoming food, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110120_MSG0005
rows.name: Okay, then can you roll out that pie crust?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110120_MSG0007
rows.name:
By the way, Lin-san, what kind
of pie are you making, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110120_MSG0010
rows.name: L-L-L-Lin-san! Tatsu is not food, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110120_MSG0011
rows.name: Tatsu may be delicious, but stop it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110120_MSG0013
rows.name:
You did that on purpose, mo!
Definitely on purpose, mo~~![ST:wait ]
